title: Hydroelectric Production Managers
description: Manage operations at hydroelectric power generation facilities. Maintain and monitor hydroelectric plant equipment for efficient and safe plant operations.

tasks.text: Direct operations, maintenance, or repair of hydroelectric power facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and communicate power system emergencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records of hydroelectric facility operations, maintenance, or repairs.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform or direct preventive or corrective containment or cleanup to protect the environment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor or inspect hydroelectric equipment, such as hydro-turbines, generators, or control systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect hydroelectric facilities, including switchyards, control houses, or relay houses, for normal operation or adherence to safety standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Supervise or monitor hydroelectric facility operations to ensure that generation or mechanical equipment conform to applicable regulations or standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or coordinate hydroelectric production operations to meet customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check hydroelectric operations for compliance with prescribed operating limits, such as loads, voltages, temperatures, lines, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or implement projects to improve efficiency, economy, or effectiveness of hydroelectric plant operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical direction in the erection or commissioning of hydroelectric equipment or supporting electrical or mechanical systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise hydropower plant equipment installations, upgrades, or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or manage hydroelectric plant upgrades.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to problems related to ratepayers, water users, power users, government agencies, educational institutions, or other private or public power resource interests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or review budgets, annual plans, power contracts, power rates, standing operating procedures, power reviews, or engineering studies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement policy evaluation procedures for hydroelectric generation activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate energized high- or low-voltage hydroelectric power transmission system substations, according to procedures and safety requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create or enforce hydrostation voltage schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
